scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.build: cd server && npm install && npx prisma generate && npm run build && cd ../client && npm install && npm run build
scripts.start:prod: cd server && npx prisma db push --skip-generate && cd .. && node server/dist/index.js
scripts.db:push: cd server && npx prisma db push
scripts.db:migrate: cd server && npx prisma migrate deploy
